path: Problem: Derive the weekday name from a date value without changing cell formatting
Action: TEXT function with a weekday display format code (e.g., "DDD" or "DDDD")

Observation: When a cell is formatted as a date/time serial, using TEXT returns the desired weekday label as text regardless of the cell's existing number format; this avoids issues where a numeric weekday result is being displayed as a date due to formatting
